title: Editorialist Instagram UGC Fashion Description
description: Schema for describing fashion items and accessories in Instagram UGC images for search and tagging.

short_description.description: A 5-7 word concise, keyword-rich description of the image as a whole.

people.description: List of people detected in the image, each with their visible clothing and accessories.

person_index.description: Index of the person in the image (starting from 1).

items.description: List of visible clothing items and accessories for this person.

garment_type.description: Type of garment or accessory (e.g., cropped top, sunglasses, tote bag).

fabric_material.description: Fabric or material (e.g., cotton, leather, denim, silk).

cut_silhouette.description: Cut or silhouette (e.g., oversized, fitted, cropped, wide-leg).

details.description: Notable details (e.g., textured, minimalist, embroidered, logo, hardware).

accessories.description: Accessory details if relevant (e.g., gold chain, tortoiseshell frame).

brand.description: Brand name if clearly visible, else null.
